ddls:
CREATE TABLE "emissions_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emissions record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the emissions data */,
  "cement_emissions" REAL /* Emissions from cement and other carbonates (in g CO2e) */,
  "natural_gas_emissions" REAL /* Emissions from natural gas and petroleum systems (in g CO2e) */,
  "iron_steel_emissions" REAL /* Emissions from iron and steel production (in g CO2e) */,
  "chemicals_emissions" REAL /* Emissions from chemical production (in g CO2e) */,
  "aluminum_emissions" REAL /* Emissions from aluminum production (in g CO2e) */,
  "desalination_emissions" REAL /* Emissions from desalination processes (in g CO2e) */,
  "agriculture_emissions" REAL /* Emissions from agriculture (in g CO2e) */,
  "other_industries_emissions" REAL /* Emissions from other industries (in g CO2e) */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the emissions are recorded */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specific facility or plant */,
  "emission_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the emission type (e.g., CO2, CH4) */,
  "data_reliability" REAL /* Score indicating the reliability of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the data has been verified by a third party */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emissions_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emissions_data_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emissions_data_emission_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("emission_type_id") REFERENCES emission_types ("emission_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emissions_data_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emissions_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "parent_industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent industry (for hierarchical industry categories) */,
  "sector" TEXT /* The broader sector the industry belongs to (e.g., manufacturing, energy) */,
  "average_emission" REAL /* Average emissions for the industry */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the industry information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" INTEGER /* Year of emissions data */,
  "fiscal_year" TEXT /* Fiscal year (e.g., 2016-2017) */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season (e.g., Winter, Spring, Summer, Fall) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source providing emissions data */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries related to the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., government, private, academic) */,
  "reliability_score" REAL /* A score indicating the reliability of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data source information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emission_types" (
  "emission_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emission type */,
  "emission_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the emission type (e.g., CO2, CH4) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the emission type */,
  "chemical_formula" TEXT /* Chemical formula of the emission type */,
  "global_warming_potential" REAL /* Global warming potential (GWP) of the emission type */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the emission type information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emission_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path of the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., annual, quarterly, custom) */,
  "summary" TEXT /* A brief summary of the report */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date when the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the emissions record being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user at the time of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access device */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES emissions_data ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality record */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the emissions record being assessed */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the quality assessment */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Score indicating the quality of the data */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding the assessment */,
  "assessor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the quality assessment */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for the quality assessment */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the quality assessment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES emissions_data ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_assessor_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or continent the country belongs to */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the country information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the facility */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry the facility belongs to */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the facility information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facilities_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)
